# Company Landing (Astro) LLM Guide

Purpose: guide agents customizing the `company-landing-astro` template ‚Äî a pure
static company landing / marketing page built with Astro. No backend, no API, no
database, no modules.

## Read First

- `microservices.template.json` ‚Äî template manifest (category `marketing-site`,
  `runtime.framework: astro`, `modules.required: []`)
- `microservices.config.json` ‚Äî `modules: []`, registry URL
- `microservices.lock.json` ‚Äî empty `modules` (this template uses none)
- `intake.schema.json` ‚Äî short wizard/agent intake for company facts, products,
  contact details, brand accent, and asset paths
- `content.schema.json` ‚Äî the content contract (JSON Schema, draft 2020-12),
  including the `x-microservices` envelope (write target + verify command)
- `CLAUDE.md` / `README.agent.md` ‚Äî the customization playbook
- `docs/api-boundary.md` ‚Äî why there is no server/API boundary

## The One Rule

All copy and the brand accent are **data**, not code. To make this the customer's
site, edit **`src/content.json` only**. Components, layouts, pages, and styles
read from that JSON ‚Äî do not edit them for content changes.

## Structure

```txt
src/content.json          customer-editable content (hero, features, process,
                            pricing, theme.accent) ‚Äî the single source of truth
intake.schema.json        short setup/intake contract for wizards and agents
content.schema.json       contract: types, maxLength, minItems/maxItems, x-hint
src/                      Astro pages/components/layouts (render content; no data)
src/site.config.ts        types content.json ‚Äî do not edit
src/styles/tokens.css     design tokens ‚Äî do not edit for brand color
public/                   static assets served as-is
scripts/validate-content.mjs   schema validator (runs on `validate` + `prebuild`)
scripts/microservices.js  workspace shim
```

## Content Rules (from content.schema.json)

- Respect every `maxLength` and array `minItems`/`maxItems`.
- `features`, process steps, and pricing plans are **exactly 3** (fixed grids).
- `features[].icon` must be one of: `engineering`, `design`, `performance`.
- Mark **exactly one** pricing plan `featured: true`.
- Links are in-page anchors (`#features`), `mailto:`, or `https://` URLs.
- `theme.accent` is one `#rrggbb` hex (optional); it derives the whole accent
  system. Pick enough contrast on the warm-paper background.
- `additionalProperties` is false ‚Äî extra fields fail validation and the build.

## Customize

1. Set the production origin: `site` in `astro.config.mjs` (used for canonical
   URLs and OG tags).
2. Edit `src/content.json` to the customer's company.
3. Optionally set `theme.accent`.

## Verify & Build

```bash
npm run validate   # fast schema check, path-pointed errors
npm run dev        # preview locally
npm run build      # runs validate (prebuild) then astro build -> ./dist
```

## Deploy

Static only. `astro build` emits `./dist`; upload those assets to a static host.
`wrangler.jsonc` points Cloudflare static assets at `./dist` (no Worker `main`).

## Do Not

- Do not add a server, API routes, SSR adapter, database, or modules ‚Äî that would
  break the static category and the boundary in `docs/api-boundary.md`.
- Do not edit `src/site.config.ts` or `src/styles/tokens.css` for brand color.
- Do not add fields outside `content.schema.json`.
